zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada of Scotland於1164年1月出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓時，她的父親William 'The Lion' King of Scotland22歲，母親Isabel d'Avenel21歲。她於1184年與Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1204年1月11日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada of Scotland于1164年1月出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓时，她的父亲William 'The Lion' King of Scotland22岁，母亲Isabel d'Avenel21岁。她于1184年与Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1204年1月11日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Scotland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Scotland, Scolland. Found in Normandy as well as England, it evidently denoted a Scot or someone with an association with Scotland.
ethnic name for someone from Scotland, from Middle English Scotlond ‘Scotland’. Compare England .

variants.name: England
meanings: English: habitational name from Middle English Engelond ‘England’. It was probably a formal alternative to English , which is also well evidenced as a surname in England. These names may have been acquired by English landowners who moved in Norman social circles or who lived in a neighbouring country (Scotland, Wales, or Ireland), or by English merchants who traded abroad.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farmsteads so named, from Old Norse eng ‘meadow’ + land ‘land’.
Swedish: ornamental name with the same meaning as 2.

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada of Scotland was born in January 1164, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, was 22 and her mother, Isabel d'Avenel, was 21. She married Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar in 1184, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 11 January 1204, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada of Scotland est née en janvier 1164, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabel d'Avenel, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar en 1184, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 janvier 1204, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada of Scotland im Januar 1164 in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William 'The Lion' King of Scotland 22 und ihre Mutter Isabel d'Avenel 21. Sie hat 1184 in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Januar 1204 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada of Scotland è nata il nel gennaio 1164 nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Isabel d'Avenel, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar nel 1184, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 gennaio 1204, nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada of Scotlandが1164年1月にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで生まれた時，父William 'The Lion' King of Scotlandは22歳，母Isabel d'Avenelは21歳であった。1184年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーでPatrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1204年1月11日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーで40歳で死去した。

ko.Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Ada of Scotland(이)가 1164년 1월 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William 'The Lion' King of Scotland(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel d'Avenel(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1184년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1204년 1월 11일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada of Scotland nasceu em janeiro de 1164, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, William 'The Lion' King of Scotland, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabel d'Avenel, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar em 1184, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland: дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada of Scotland родилась январь 1164 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William 'The Lion' King of Scotland было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel d'Avenel, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar в 1184 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 11 января 1204 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет.

Se casó con Patrick I de Dunbar 4th  Earl of Dunbar en 1184, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de enero de 1204, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 40 años.
